description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a large, metallic head. The handle is medium brown with visible wood grain, ergonomically shaped for a secure grip, and widens slightly at the base. The axe head is made of a silvery-gray metal, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite end. The blade is thick and tapers to a sharp edge, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks. The head is securely mounted onto the handle, with no visible fasteners or decorative elements. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and durability for use in urban maintenance, gardening, or emergency scenarios.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a broad, metallic wedge-shaped blade, designed for chopping and splitting tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the curved wooden handle and the broad, wedge-shaped metal blade.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rectangular cross-section of the axe head and the narrow width of the blade edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the pointed blade edge and the alignment of the handle with the head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with ergonomic grip, oval cross-section, and a slightly flared base for secure handling.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll and a sharp cutting edge, no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle's end.
